about.title: ABOUT ME
about.description: In my journey as a full-stack web developer, I have stood out by contributing to successful teams on award-winning projects, earning multiple prizes in international competitions and securing funding as a result of these achievements. My technical contributions were essential to the success of these initiatives, demonstrating my ability to deliver results in challenging and competitive environments.

descriptions.faculmatch: My first major project, FaculMatch started as a school project. It is a website where students can find their ideal college through filters. The project expanded beyond IFSC, gaining new features and including colleges from all over the country!
descriptions.timeline: Timeline is a project where I showcase all my small projects in a single repository, mainly focusing on projects from my technical course, but also including training projects and future projects from my degree.
descriptions.waystation: I worked on the frontend and was responsible for integrating it with the backend through endpoints. Using Expo, I also handled the app version control. The app is not finished yet, so the button redirects to a website explaining the project.
descriptions.codesnape: In this project, you can store code snippets for quick access. It features an account system and a complete CRUD for snippets, allowing you to select programming languages as well as create and apply tags to them.
descriptions.reptors: This project was part of a Game Jam with the themes of horror, dinosaurs, and time travel. Developed in two weeks, it is a choice-based survival game in which the player must survive until the final day to return to the present.

ifsc-tech.title: Technical Course in Information Technology Integrated with High School
ifsc-tech.description: My experience at IFSC Garopaba was truly transformative. It was through the institution that I began my career as a programmer. There, I built my entire development foundation, learning frontend, backend, databases, mobile application development, networks and systems, and computing as a whole.

ifsc-grad.title: Bachelor’s Degree in Systems Analysis and Development
subjects: Topics in Systems Analysis and Development
ifsc-grad.description: After a lot of dedication and study, I was able to enroll in my long-awaited undergraduate degree. Even in my first year, I have been learning a great deal at college, gaining a deeper understanding of the fundamentals of the IT field and acquiring extensive new knowledge in the area. It is always rewarding to apply at work what I learned in the course just a week earlier.
